response.justification: While the candidate meets the minimum 15-year experience requirement and brings recent exposure to AI infrastructure through MCP work at re:cinq, the AI expertise is too newly acquired (~2 months) to demonstrate the director-level strategic depth the role requires. Critically, there is no track record of building AI products or platforms—a core preferred qualification—and no evidence of the strategic leadership needed to advise customers on cutting-edge AI adoption or drive organizational AI innovation.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software engineering across diverse domains and technologies
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor others (GISCollective founder, staff-level roles, teaching workshops)
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure and agentic workflows through MCP work at re:cinq
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (2 months at current role) and appears tactical rather than strategic; insufficient to establish recognized AI expertise
No demonstrated AI products or platforms built; the resume shows generalist breadth but no AI specialization or deep domain expertise
Career pattern reflects operational engineering roles rather than director-level strategic leadership; unclear evidence of driving organizational innovation or advising at executive level
